content_plan.context: Lead single 'Glass Horizon' drops April 10. Content builds anticipation, delivers the release, and sustains engagement.

posts.copy: something is coming through the glass. 04.10.
posts.notes: Teaser artwork — cropped, mysterious. Lowercase caption.

posts.copy: pov: you wrote a song about the moment right before everything changes
posts.notes: 15-sec clip of studio session with track preview. Trending audio optional.
Use countdown sticker. Link to pre-save.

posts.copy: glass horizon is yours now. link in bio.
posts.notes: Release day. Static artwork post + story burst. Pin to grid.

posts.copy: the synth sound that started this whole EP
posts.notes: Behind-the-scenes production clip. Show the DAW. 30 sec.

posts.copy: making the video for glass horizon today
posts.notes: Music video BTS. Raw footage, no polish.

posts.copy: Writing about what Glass Horizon means to me
posts.notes: Long-form Bandcamp blog post. Personal, emotional.
Engagement driver. Screenshot lyrics, run poll.

posts.copy: replying to a comment about the bridge in glass horizon
posts.notes: Reply format performs well. Pick a genuine comment.
Aesthetic lifestyle photo. Keep presence without overselling.

posts.copy: songs that sound like driving through fog at 2am — starting with mine
posts.notes: Trend format: curated list with own track featured.
EP announcement. Reveal artwork, tracklist, date.

posts.copy: the five moods of soft machines, explained in 30 seconds
posts.notes: Quick-cut montage. One visual per track.

posts.copy: pre-save soft machines. it means everything.
posts.notes: Direct CTA with pre-save link. Simple.
